unmodeled_mechanics.idle_ack_reactivation_snapshot: Simulation uses direct phase-aware presence selection and does not emulate manual idle acknowledgements.
unmodeled_mechanics.vault_market_spending: Vault supply/cost interactions are excluded in Phase 1 to keep seasonal economy focus on coins, stars, sigils, boosts, theft, freeze, and settlement.
unmodeled_mechanics.live_api_concurrency_ordering: Actions are resolved in a deterministic per-tick order after accrual instead of concurrent API timing.

sweep.scenario_description: Phase-gated sink combined with inflation-tighten-plus-ubi overrides. Tests whether sink + inflation market pressure together produce a stable combined effect without the perverse single-season inflation-tighten behavior.
